integron_finder.interpretation: CALIN = chromosomally integrated class 1 integron (integrase lost = permanently integrated MDR)

genomad.interpretation: DTR+ITR confirm transposon-mediated chromosomal integration mechanism

integrated_mechanism:
Proposed mechanism for SA cluster MDR:
1. Conjugative plasmid (IncFII, 41 kb DTR) enters pig Y. enterocolitica
2. Class 1 integron on plasmid acquires sat2/dfrA1/floR/aadA1 cassettes
3. Transposon (ITR elements) mediates integron transfer to chromosome
4. Plasmid may be lost; chromosomal CALIN element persists permanently
Result: stable heritable MDR unaffected by plasmid curing
